name: Torpedo
description: A Torgue assault rifle that fires a single micro-rocket instead of a standard round. The projectile travels faster and straighter than most Torgue rifle shots, then explodes on impact, making the weapon feel more like a compact launcher than a conventional rifle. Every shot is pure splash damage, so it leans into explosive-focused play despite using assault-rifle ammo.
notes: Consumes 4 rounds per shot. All damage is splash, so kills can trigger Krieg's Blood Bath, and the resulting gun-damage bonus also boosts later shots. Blood Overdrive cannot be activated. Gun-damage bonuses increase the explosion, but grenade, splash, and launcher-damage bonuses do not. If it spawns without an accessory, it uses the prefix "Rocket" instead of the usual grip prefix. Its shots can be absorbed by absorption shields and converted into rocket launcher ammo. It appears only at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable world-drop sources.
